candidate_definitions.text: Official PyTorch implementation of Two-branch Dehazing, wining runner-up awards in NTIRE 2021.

This is the official PyTorch implementation of Two-branch Dehazing. See more details in [[report]](https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2021W/NTIRE/papers/Ancuti_NTIRE_2021_NonHomogeneous_Dehazing_Challenge_Report_CVPRW_2021_paper.pdf) , [[paper]](https://openaccess.thecvf.…

candidate_glosses.text: This is the official PyTorch implementation of Two-branch Dehazing. See more details in [[report]](https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2021W/NTIRE/papers/Ancuti_NTIRE_2021_NonHomogeneous_Dehazing_Challenge_Report_CVPRW_2021_paper.pdf) , [[paper]](https://openaccess.thecvf.…
